cause_analysis.narrative: Vita Aesthetics & Wellness churned on 2026-04-20 after 58 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 25-day silence starting 2025-12-23. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 6 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 59 day(s) before churn via sms. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 6 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-01-17 via sms, client wrote: "✨ We’re OPEN next Saturday, Jan 24th! ✨ Join us at Vita Aesthetics and enjoy 10% OFF all treatments for ONE DAY ONLY. Bo…" — no outbound response in 25 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-01-17 via sms, client wrote: "✨ We’re OPEN next Saturday, Jan 24th! ✨ Join us at Vita Aesthetics and enjoy 10% OFF all treatments for ONE DAY ONLY. Bo…" — no outbound response in 25 days.
